title: development of evas and Rei and dummy plugs
display_title: development of evas and Rei and dummy plugs
wikitext:
[]: development of evas (& Rei, & dummy plugs)             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 24, 2013 8:32 pm [Split from "Is Shinji as smart as his parents?" - NemZ] NemZ wrote: Honestly, talk of Asuka's 'experience' is vastly overstated. She was trained from a young age, yes, but we know her eva was only recently completed so she certainly hasn't had much actual time at the controls.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Sep 24, 2013 8:40 pm They're probably saying that because most of the entry plug controll seats say "Built in 2014", but that's probably only true for the seat itself rather than the whole EVA. We can assume that the interfaces started as something more primitive (perhaps resembling Rebuild Yui's weird harness - either way, ep 21 technobabble dialogue makes it sound like whatever was there involved crudely drilling a hole into EVA 01 just before the actual experiment) and then got gradually modernized over the years.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Sep 24, 2013 8:54 pm It's really weird how Asuka and Unit 02 were the only pilot and Eva that was being readied for combat operations for several years, while the prototype was fired up like a week before the angels arrived and Unit 01 just sat there the whole time. Obviously they knew when the angels would arrive, but how would they justify that to the 99.9% of Nerv/the world that doesn't know that the higher ups have a time table of when they were coming?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 24, 2013 9:40 pm Bagheera wrote: What are you talking about? As far as we know it was completed shortly before Kyoko had her CE, and that was ten years before the start of the series. Recall that it was built in Japan, with final assembly taking place in Germany.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Sep 24, 2013 11:29 pm This almost looks like a Discussion topic at this point, and is talking about a lot more than just Shinji. Not sure what I'm gonna do with it but a split seems inevitable.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Sep 25, 2013 12:06 am Took care of it. So... how much do we actually know for sure about how the evas were developed, when, where, and how?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Sep 25, 2013 12:23 am Almost nothing, except that the production model was operational well before the prototype or "test type". Unless Asuka trained in a simulation body and the Gaghiel fight was the first time she ever actually piloted it, but it doesn't seem that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:00 am Chuckman wrote: It's really weird how Asuka and Unit 02 were the only pilot and Eva that was being readied for combat operations for several years, while the prototype was fired up like a week before the angels arrived and Unit 01 just sat there the whole time. Obviously they knew when the angels would arrive, but how would they justify that to the 99.9% of Nerv/the world that doesn't know that the higher ups have a time table of when they were coming?

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:17 am NemZ wrote: And we know Yui's activation test happened before 01 was actually complete (still connected to Lilith and growing)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:27 am Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: Sorry, where's the evidence of that?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:31 am Chuckman wrote: Almost nothing, except that the production model was operational well before the prototype or "test type".

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:33 am Bagheera wrote: I have yet to find a way to make sense of the Children's numbering scheme.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:36 am NemZ wrote: What's wrong with the children's numbering scheme? It just follows the order in which they were officially recognized.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:40 am Bagheera wrote: But that's the point. There's no sense to recognizing Rei first, since any criteria used to suggest she should be a pilot would also apply to Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:53 am Monk Ed wrote: It's a big hint that Gendo was either A) avoiding Shinji or B) trying to let Shinji live as much of a life away from Eva as possible or C) both .

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Wed Sep 25, 2013 3:58 am NemZ wrote: Rei. She was created as a result of the salvage operations to retrieve Yui

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Sep 25, 2013 5:08 am Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: That seems like an interesting point, but I guess having a grown up soul/psyche into a young girl body would have been weird? Also, the salvage of Shinji in Ep 20 (which is a re-issue of the Yui salvage) shows (quite clearly IMO) that the original body of the person absorbed could be re-consolidated within the Entry Plug, so no real need of a dummy body?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Sep 25, 2013 5:52 am Bagheera wrote: It's in the liner notes for one of the Japanese release DVDs. The picture we see of Lilith and Unit 01 connected is specifically noted as being taken from the time of the CE.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Sep 25, 2013 5:54 am Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: That seems like an interesting point, but I guess having a grown up soul/psyche into a young girl body would have been weird? Also, the salvage of Shinji in Ep 20 (which is a re-issue of the Yui salvage) shows (quite clearly IMO) that the original body of the person absorbed could be re-consolidated within the Entry Plug, so no real need of a dummy body?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Sep 25, 2013 6:15 am Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: Sure if Rei had been around then, given Naoko's major role in the salvation, seeing Rei in 2010 wouldn't have surprised her as much? (...) Also, Lilith's sould could have been put into Rei later on. Say, they created her as a shell to salvage Yui's soul, it didn't work but at a later time (maybe after the decision of going ahead with Instrumentality?) they thought of getting Lilith's soul into Rei.
summary:
[]: development of evas (& Rei, & dummy plugs)             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 24, 2013 8:32 pm [Split from "Is Shinji as smart as his parents?" - NemZ] NemZ wrote: Honestly, talk of Asuka's 'experience' is vastly overstated. She was trained from a young age, yes, but we know her eva was only recently completed so she certainly hasn't had much actual time at the controls.
